description_long: This helmet features a matte black dome with a wide, flat brim encircling its base. Around the circumference, there is a prominent white band marked with black numerical increments, resembling a timer or gauge, and a red triangular indicator at the front. The helmet is paired with a purple, textured garment and greenish gloves, suggesting a stylized or character-themed design. The surface appears hard and slightly textured, with no visible vents or visor. The retention system is not clearly visible, but there are black straps hanging down. The overall look is unique, blending utilitarian and whimsical elements.
description: A matte black helmet with a white numbered band and red triangle, paired with a purple garment and green gloves, featuring a hard, slightly textured surface.
description_view_0: Front view shows the red triangle indicator, white numbered band, and purple garment details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the continuation of the numbered band and the purple sleeve with glove.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the helmet and garment, with the numbered band wrapping around.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the numbered band from 0 to 30 and the purple sleeve with glove.
attribute_graphic_design: White band with black numerical increments and a red triangle on a matte black surface.
